title: Apartment options
content:
Apartment options


The Lodge

Pros:
  • Washer and dryer included
  • Nice floor plan
  • Good location
  • Gated
Cons:
  • Parking situation is rough apparently
  • Only one dumpster and no recycling
  • Internet connection not good??

Kensington

Pros:
  • Nice floor plan
  • Gated
  • Good amenities
Cons:
  • Farthest away of all options
  • No washer and dryer in unit
  • Highest price of all options

Timberlinks

Pros:
  • Internet included in rent but it too seems to be a not great internet plan?
  • Washer and dryer included
  • Nice gym
  • Nice location
Cons:
  • Least favorite floor plan - lots of wasted wall space with extra closets and doors

Fountains

Pros:
  • Gated
  • Good reviews
  • Updated units for reasonable price
  • Closest to campus and loop
